title: Dryomenis kwarenkoensis
taxonomy: Dryomenis kwarenkoensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Styracaceae. This plant is native to China and is a part of the genus Dryomenis. The classification of Dryomenis kwarenkoensis includes being a member of the order Ericales, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The exact classification of Dryomenis kwarenkoensis may vary slightly depending on the taxonomic source used. The classification of the plant provides insights into its evolutionary history and relationships with other species within the Styracaceae family.
